ParserLogicNotes: src-tauri/src/translation_runtime.rs builds old parser BuffName from src/lib/config/BuffName.json.
src-tauri/src/translation_runtime.rs builds old skillnames from config RecountTable/DamageAttrIdName plus bundled meter-data SkillEffectTable/SkillFightLevelTable/TempAttrTable.
Those paths are probe clues only here; this audit classifies whether their ids still have direct current game-file evidence.
